book.ars_arcane_matrix.matrix_core.overv: The $(item)Arcane Matrix Core$() is an endgame Source generator crafted with an Enchanting Apparatus. Place it at the center of three mutually perpendicular 5 by 5 rings made from Source Gem Blocks.$(br2)It stores generated Source internally.
book.ars_arcane_matrix.arcane_mine.overv: The $(item)Arcane Mine$() converts Sourcestone and Source Gems into tagged ore blocks. Build complete 3, 5, 7, and 9-wide inverted-beacon layers above the core. Each layer uses Source Gem Blocks at its center and four corners.$(br2)Dominion Wand links follow Starbuncle transport order: select a container and then the core for material input, or select the core and then a container for ore output. Loaded containers may be in other dimensions.
documentation.ars_arcane_matrix.matrix_c: The Arcane Matrix Core is an endgame Source generator crafted with an Enchanting Apparatus. Build three mutually perpendicular 5 by 5 rings around the core using Source Gem Blocks. It stores generated Source internally.
documentation.ars_arcane_matrix.arcane_m: The Arcane Mine is a Source-powered inverted-beacon multiblock. Select a container and then the core for material input, or the core and then a container for ore output. Complete larger layers to unlock more valuable data-driven ores.
